free_text: Core-excited states of Fe-54 from the Fe-56(p,t)Fe-54
The Fe-56 target was prepared by centrifugally
setting the enriched 56-Fe(2)O(3) powder onto a 0.4
mg/cm**2 mylar backing. The absolute value of the
cross section was determined with a natural iron foil,
.Comparison with the DWBA calculation was made
by a position detector consisting of 200 proportional
accurate to within  10% uncertainty being due to the
fluctuation of the efficiency of each proportional
SD: REACTION code corrected in Subent 18;
Headings of uncertainties were changed according to
EXFOR rules. BIB updated in all Subents.
